summary: Rowdy Scarlet Begonias and an eclectic second set make the show shine, though Fire on the Mountain suffers from flutter and the recording is split across sources.
review: The performance is highlighted by a thunderous Scarlet Begonias that kicks off a wildly eclectic second set, earning high praise from fans. Recording quality is mixed – while most of the tape sounds good, there are notable flutter problems on Fire on the Mountain and the set is currently only available in separate parts, suggesting a matrix source would be ideal.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is rated very high based on enthusiastic comments, but recording issues (flutter on Fire on the Mountain and incomplete set source) pull the overall rating down.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Generally decent sound, but noticeable flutter on Fire on the Mountain; current release only covers part of the show, prompting calls for a proper matrix remaster.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Eclectic second set that opens with an especially rowdy Scarlet Begonias; overall pacing praised despite missing first‑set material in this source.
